features: Will work with any flint lighter including zippo
Clipper Flints are available to extend the life of your Clipper lighter
If you want to refresh your Clipper lighter then pick up a pack of Flints and keep the flame going
Each pack includes 9 universal Clipper Flints
Pair these genuine Clipper replacement Flints with a can of the finest vector Butane and you too can be an firestarter
description: Clipper universal cigarette lighter x9 Flints |it will work in all flint including zippo lighters Clipper Flints are available to extend the life of your Clipper lighter. If you want to refresh your Clipper lighter then pick up a pack of Flints and keep the flame going. Each pack includes 9 universal Clipper Flints which fit snugly in all the Clipper lighters we sell. The Flints may fit other lighters as well like the zippo. Pair these genuine Clipper replacement Flints with a can of the finest vector Butane and you too can be an firestarter. Don't lose the Clipper and you're lighter needs are covered for many years.
